name: Howteh Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Howteh Technology Co., Ltd. provides active and passive components, and equipment in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers connector, FFC, thunderbolt cable, MEMS, coaxial cable, conversion line, USB type C, audio amplifier, and LED controller products, as well as power management, radio frequency, and touch components. It also provides printed circuit boards and optoelectronic equipment. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
